scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix dapp
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,frontend,dapp -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix dapp"
scripts.dev:site: concurrently -n api,frontend -c cyan,green "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:dapp: concurrently -n api,dapp -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix dapp"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,frontend,dapp -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix api" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix dapp"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix api && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix dapp
